name: commit-helper
abstract: Generic commit-message helper that inspects explicit repo-local rules, recent history, and staged semantics to support conventional, gitmoji, plain imperative, and repo-custom commit styles with conservative fallback behavior. Repo-local editor settings count as gitmoji config only when they contain actual gitmoji.* keys. When invoked, it preserves a strict commit-helper-only boundary and refuses to add external orchestration, Lore, or automation co-author metadata unless repo-local rules or the user explicitly require it.
